name: CROSS_TOP_PARTNER_TARGETS_BY_TARGET
description: Top partner targets for a given target.
cypher:
MATCH (t:Target {symbol:$target})<-[:HAS_TARGET]-(tp:TargetPair)-[:HAS_TARGET]->(p2:Target)
WHERE p2.symbol <> t.symbol
RETURN p2.symbol AS partner_target, count(DISTINCT tp) AS pair_count
ORDER BY pair_count DESC, partner_target
LIMIT 10;
